zh.lifeSummary: 當Eberhard II von Eberstein於1123年出生在巴登阿赤 巴登艾波斯坦波格時，他的父親Berthold IV von Eberstein28歲，母親Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg19歲。他和Adelheid von Sayn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1207年在巴登阿赤 巴登巴登-巴登享年84歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Eberstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German ober ‘upper’ + stein ‘rock, stone’, also ‘castle’, hence a habitational or topographic name from the place Idar-Oberstein in Rhineland-Palatinate with the latter part of the name taken from a rock above the town.

nameMeanings.name: Eberhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eberhard II von Eberstein was born in 1123, in Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, his father, Berthold IV von Eberstein, was 28 and his mother, Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Adelheid von Sayn. He died in 1207, in Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eberhard II von Eberstein est né en 1123, à Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, son père, Berthold IV von Eberstein, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Adelheid von Sayn. Il est décédé en 1207, à Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden, à l’âge de 84 ans.

Er hatte mit Adelheid von Sayn mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1207 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eberhard II von Eberstein è nato il nel 1123 nel Ebersteinburg, Amt Baden, Baden, il suo padre, Berthold IV von Eberstein, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Adelheid von Sayn. Morì nel 1207, nel Baden-Baden, Amt Baden, Baden, all'età di 84 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eberhard II von Eberstein(이)가 1123년 바든 아트 바든 에버스타인버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Berthold IV von Eberstein(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Sayn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1207년 바든 아트 바든 바데-바든에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eberhard II von Eberstein родился в 1123 г. в местности эбирстинбург, амт баден, баден, его отцу по имени Berthold IV von Eberstein было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Uta von Calw-Sindelfingen genannt Herzogin von Schauenburg, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Adelheid von Sayn. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности баден-баден, амт баден, баден в возрасте 84 лет.
